title: esenbeckia berlandieri subsp. acapulcensis
intro: Esenbeckia berlandieri subsp. acapulcensis, also known as Acapulco daisy or Mexican feather daisy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Esenbeckia berlandieri subsp. acapulcensis is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms associated with colds and flu, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-diabetic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized and harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
